title: Create core/events.py - Core event definitions
description: Create src/tflow/core/events.py implementing core event infrastructure. This module should provide base event types and utilities that unify the event handling across the system. Currently JobEvent is in broker/event.py and BridgeEvent is in realtime/bridge.py - core/events.py should provide the foundational event classes.

criteria: EventType enum with common event types
convergence.verification: python -c 'from tflow.core.events import CoreEvent, EventType; print(CoreEvent.__doc__)'

implementation: Create EventType enum with common event types (WORKFLOW_STARTED, WORKFLOW_COMPLETED, TASK_CREATED, TASK_COMPLETED, etc.)
Create CoreEvent base class with event_id, event_type, timestamp, payload attributes
Add to_dict() and from_dict() for serialization
Create EventEmitter mixin for publish-subscribe pattern
Export JobEvent from broker/event.py for compatibility

commands: python -c 'from tflow.core.events import CoreEvent, EventType; print("Import OK")'

reference.pattern: Follow broker/event.py JobEvent pattern for event structure
